div1.entryFree: Throughout, prep. in every part of, in all: a man well known t. all Italy, Shr. II, 69. every sovereign state t. the world, John V, 2, 82. ne'er t. the year to church thou goest, H6A I, 1, 42. t. the town, I, 6, 11. t. every town proclaim them traitors, H6B IV, 2, 186. follow thee t. the world, Rom. II, 2, 148.
